claim: Less than 10% of AI pilots reach production; trust and governance are the main barriers to scaling AI in financial services
actionable: Before building AI solutions for regulated industries, design governance and auditability into the architecture from day one
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Knowledge graphs are critical for trustworthy financial AI; they provide transparency and control over agent reasoning
actionable: Build knowledge graphs for financial domains using LLMs; use them to govern and constrain AI reasoning
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: AI systems must be provable, not just predictive; finance requires auditability and explainability of every decision
actionable: Design financial AI with confidence scores and audit trails; show exactly why each recommendation was made
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: LLMs are one tool in a larger AI system; traditional ML models, knowledge graphs, and APIs are equally important
actionable: Don't assume LLMs can do everything; keep specialized ML models for financial calculations, APIs for data, KGs for reasoning
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Posquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Internal data and IP are critical for financial AI; 70% of corporate knowledge is internal and not in public models
actionable: Build domain-specific agents that can be trained on internal financial data and policies
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Document quality warnings are more important than perfect accuracy; tell users where data quality is uncertain
actionable: In financial AI, always flag uncertain data sources and quality issues; don't hide limitations
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Temporal knowledge graphs track how relationships evolve over time; critical for financial reasoning and causal inference
actionable: Use temporal KGs to model financial relationships and detect regime changes in markets
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Red teaming and jailbreak testing are essential; spend time deliberately breaking your financial AI to find failure modes
actionable: Before deploying financial AI, conduct adversarial testing; document all failure modes and add guardrails
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Model surveillance is needed; when agents misbehave in production, you need feedback loops to detect and correct
actionable: Build monitoring for financial agents; detect unexpected behavior changes and enable retraining feedback
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance

claim: Sovereign AI architecture gives enterprises control; LLMs from other providers are too risky for mission-critical finance
actionable: Build internalized AI platforms for finance; avoid public LLM APIs for trade decisions or sensitive reasoning
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance
